name: David Letterman
bio: David Letterman is an American comedian and television host best known for his irreverent, ironic late-night talk shows, Late Night with David Letterman on NBC and Late Show with David Letterman on CBS. Over 33 years he hosted 6,080 episodes, becoming the longest-serving late-night talk show host in American television history. He began his career as a stand-up comedian before moving to hosting.

timeline.ev: First appearance as a stand-up on The Tonight Show Starring Johnny Carson
Late Night with David Letterman debuts on NBC
Moves to CBS to launch Late Show with David Letterman
Hosts final Late Show broadcast, ending a 33-year late-night run
Launches Netflix interview series My Next Guest Needs No Introduction

accolades: Kennedy Center Mark Twain Prize for American Humor (2017)
Longest-serving late-night talk show host in U.S. television history

specials.t: My Next Guest Needs No Introduction
